title: Buttery Argentinian Rice Stir-Fry
description: A crowd-pleasing low-calorie-friendly Argentine dish featuring crispy rice vinegar and a touch of butter for an irresistible texture and flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Garlic Clove
ingredients.notes: For added flavor, crush with a pinch of salt and black pepper first

instructions: Cook the white Basmati Rice according to package instructions. Drain any excess water.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add crushed garlic with salt and black pepper, cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in rice vinegar, butter, and chili flakes (if using). Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add cooked rice to the skillet, toss gently to coat evenly. Cook for another minute or two until all liquid is absorbed and the rice is slightly crispy on top.
Season with additional salt and black pepper as needed. Serve hot immediately.
